arts.ttl: Haaland reality, ban verdict - bitter Arteta and Arsenal forget home truths amid Man City furore
arts.sum: Manchester City and Arsenal played out a pulsating 2-2 Premier League draw on Sunday

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola issues update on Rodri injury with fears Man City star could miss season
arts.sum: Manchester City midfielder Rodri limped off the pitch during the dramatic draw with Arsenal at the weekend - with reports suggesting he could miss the entirety of the season

arts.ttl: Rodri set for spell out as Manchester City wait for ‘decision of the doctors’
arts.sum: The midfielder suffered a knee problem against Arsenal on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville suggests radical Premier League rule change that would impact Man United and Man City
arts.sum: Gary Neville has suggested a wild rule change that could have huge implications for the make-up of the Premier League table

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola gives Rodri injury update amid Man City concern
arts.sum: Rodri will miss a considerable amount of Manchester City's season according to Pep Guardiola, who couldn't offer an exact timeframe for the injury.

arts.ttl: Man City made to wait for full extent of Rodri injury results
arts.sum: No news for the Premier League champions who could be without a key player all year

arts.ttl: LIVE: Man City host Watford in Carabao Cup clash
arts.sum: Manchester City are in action in the Carabao Cup days after their dramatic draw with Arsenal - follow for all the updates from ESPN.

arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta hints his side suffered a 'serious injury' in fiery 2-2 draw at Man City... with 'a few' of his players set to miss Carabao Cup tie against Bolton
arts.sum: Arsenal were accused of 'dark arts' against Man City but Arteta says there's a serious cause for concern with one of his players and revealed 'a few' will be unavailable for the third round tie against Bolton.

arts.ttl: Who is Kaden Braithwaite? 16-year-old Man City defender in shock debut vs Watford in Carabao Cup
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola handed a shock debut to 16-year-old defender Kaden Braithwaite in the Carabao Cup vs Watford.

arts.ttl: Man City confirmed XI:16-year-old handed senior debut in Watford EFL Cup tie
arts.sum: Sixteen-year-old Kaden Braithwaite will make his senior debut for Manchester City in tonight’s EFL Cup third-round tie against Watford, with Pep Guardiola making a total of nine changes.
